false_form: Landsberg-Ressayre 2017 gives an exponential lower bound on dc(perm_n) unrestricted.
name: EQUIVARIANT_EXPONENTIAL_RESTRICTED
true_form: Landsberg-Ressayre 2017 (arXiv:1508.05788) exponential lower bound on dc(perm) is RESTRICTED to the equivariant model only. It is NOT a lower bound on dc(perm_n) unrestricted. Mignon-Ressayre n^2/2 (2004 IMRN) remains the current best for the unrestricted dc(perm_n). HARD-5 / PATTERN_RANK_PARITY_LEAK at the model-restriction layer.
